nasb.text: all the kingdom of Og in Bashan, who reigned in Ashtaroth and in Edrei (he alone was left of the remnant of the Rephaim); for Moses struck them and dispossessed them.

esv.text: all the kingdom of Og in Bashan, who reigned in Ashtaroth and in Edrei (he alone was left of the remnant of the Rephaim); these Moses had struck and driven out.

cnv.text: 另有巴珊王噩的全國，他在亞斯他錄和以得來作王；他是利乏音人留下的唯一餘民。這些地方的人，摩西都把他們擊殺了，趕走了。

ccb.text: 以及巴珊王噩的国土。噩曾经在亚斯她录和以得来做王，是仅存的利乏音人。摩西打败了这些人，赶走了他们。
